---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the problem or gap you're experiencing.
(e.g. "I have 500 notebooks and there's no way to bulk-export them…")

## Describe the solution you'd like

What would you like InkSight to do?

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you've tried, or alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, related issues — anything helpful.
